allow: PowerShell(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('damai_monitor.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('syntax OK'\)"; python damai_monitor.py --help)

PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \($py\) { & $py -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('damai_monitor.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('syntax OK'\)"; & $py damai_monitor.py --help } else { Write-Output "python/py not found on PATH" })

PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \(-not $py\) { $py = \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source }; if \(-not $py\) { Write-Output "NOT FOUND"; exit }; Write-Output "interpreter: $py"; & $py --version; & $py -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('damai_monitor.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('syntax OK'\)"; & $py -c "import requests; print\('requests', requests.__version__\)")
PowerShell(python -c "import requests; print\('requests OK, version:', requests.__version__\)")
